title: Quantum Security Protocols for Cognitive Prosthetics
abstract: Post-quantum cryptography for neural data protection

body.text: This paper establishes quantum-resistant security protocols for cognitive prosthetics, ensuring long-term protection of neural data and cognitive privacy in the era of quantum computing.

As quantum computing advances, traditional cryptographic methods become vulnerable. Cognitive prosthetics that handle sensitive neural data must implement post-quantum cryptography to ensure lifelong privacy protection.
Grover's algorithm reducing symmetric key strength
All P31 Labs artifacts handling neural data implement post-quantum cryptographic protocols, ensuring cognitive privacy remains protected against both classical and quantum adversaries.
